revision.comment: KAMUI がページ「[[若宮社]]」を「[[若宮社 (岡崎市)]]」に移動しました: 各地に同名神社が存在する。
revision.text: #転送 [[若宮社 (岡崎市)]]

'''若宮社'''（わかみやしゃ）は日本各地にある神社。字名付きで呼ばれるものもある。
* [[石清水八幡宮]]摂社 - 京都府八幡市・重要文化財指定 * [[吉田神社]]摂社 - 京都府京都市左京区 * [[大神神社]]摂社・大直禰子神社の別名 - 奈良県桜井市 * [[広八幡神社]]摂社 - 和歌山県有田郡広川町・国宝指定 * [[若宮社（五泉市)]] - 新潟県五泉市 * [[雀森若宮社]] - 新潟県燕市 * [[若宮社 (岡崎市)]] - 愛知県岡崎市 * [[鎮守若宮社]] - 愛媛県松山市 * [[若宮社 (佐賀市)]] - 佐賀県佐賀市 * [[若宮社 (宇佐市)]] - 大分県宇佐市
== 関連項目 == * [[若宮]] * [[若宮神社]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:わかみやしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]] {{aimai}}

revision.text:
'''Wakamiya-sha''' (若宮社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. Some are distinguished by additional place names.
* {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachiman Shrine|ja|石清水八幡宮}} subsidiary shrine - Kyoto Prefecture, Yawata City; shrine building designated as an Important Cultural Property. * {{ill|Yoshida Shrine|ja|吉田神社}} subsidiary shrine - Kyoto Prefecture, Kyoto City, Sakyo Ward. * {{ill|Ōmiwa Shrine|ja|大神神社}} subsidiary shrine; another name for {{ill|Ōtataneko Shrine|ja|大直禰子神社}} - Nara Prefecture, Sakurai City. * {{ill|Hiro Hachiman Shrine|ja|広八幡神社}} subsidiary shrine - Wakayama Prefecture, Hirogawa Town; shrine building designated as an Important Cultural Property. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Gosen)|ja|若宮社（五泉市)}} - Niigata Prefecture, Gosen City. * {{ill|Suzumemori Wakamiya-sha|ja|雀森若宮社}} - Niigata Prefecture, Tsubame City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Okazaki)|ja|若宮社 (岡崎市)}} - Aichi Prefecture, Okazaki City. * {{ill|Hakusan Shrine (Heguri)|ja|白山神社 (平群町)}} subsidiary shrine - Nara Prefecture, Heguri Town. * {{ill|Chinjyu Wakamiya-sha|ja|鎮守若宮社}} - Ehime Prefecture, Matsuyama City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Saga)|ja|若宮社 (佐賀市)}} - Saga Prefecture, Saga City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Usa)|ja|若宮社 (宇佐市)}} - Ōita Prefecture, Usa City.
== See Also == * [[Wakamiya (disambiguation)]] * [[Wakamiya Shrine (disambiguation)]] * [[Wakamiya Hachiman-gū (disambiguation)]]
[[Category:Shrines with the same name]] {{Ambiguity}} [[ja:若宮社]]

'''Wakamiya-sha''' (若宮社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. Some are distinguished by additional place names.
* {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachiman Shrine|ja|石清水八幡宮}} subsidiary shrine - Kyoto Prefecture, Yawata City; shrine building designated as an Important Cultural Property. * {{ill|Yoshida Shrine|ja|吉田神社}} subsidiary shrine - Kyoto Prefecture, Kyoto City, Sakyo Ward. * {{ill|Ōmiwa Shrine|ja|大神神社}} subsidiary shrine; another name for {{ill|Ōtataneko Shrine|ja|大直禰子神社}} - Nara Prefecture, Sakurai City. * {{ill|Hiro Hachiman Shrine|ja|広八幡神社}} subsidiary shrine - Wakayama Prefecture, Hirogawa Town; shrine building designated as an Important Cultural Property. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Gosen)|ja|若宮社（五泉市)}} - Niigata Prefecture, Gosen City. * {{ill|Suzumemori Wakamiya-sha|ja|雀森若宮社}} - Niigata Prefecture, Tsubame City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Okazaki)|ja|若宮社 (岡崎市)}} - Aichi Prefecture, Okazaki City. * {{ill|Hakusan Shrine (Heguri)|ja|白山神社 (平群町)}} subsidiary shrine - Nara Prefecture, Heguri Town. * {{ill|Chinjyu Wakamiya-sha|ja|鎮守若宮社}} - Ehime Prefecture, Matsuyama City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Saga)|ja|若宮社 (佐賀市)}} - Saga Prefecture, Saga City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Usa)|ja|若宮社 (宇佐市)}} - Ōita Prefecture, Usa City.
== See Also == * [[Wakamiya (disambiguation)]] * [[Wakamiya Shrine (disambiguation)]] * [[Wakamiya Hachiman-gū (disambiguation)]]
[[Category:Shrines with the same name]] {{Ambiguity}} [[category:most recent 500]][[ja:若宮社]]

revision.text:
'''Wakamiya-sha''' (若宮社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. Some are distinguished by additional place names.
* {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachiman Shrine|ja|石清水八幡宮}} subsidiary shrine - Kyoto Prefecture, Yawata City; shrine building designated as an Important Cultural Property. * {{ill|Yoshida Shrine|ja|吉田神社}} subsidiary shrine - Kyoto Prefecture, Kyoto City, Sakyo Ward. * {{ill|Ōmiwa Shrine|ja|大神神社}} subsidiary shrine; another name for {{ill|Ōtataneko Shrine|ja|大直禰子神社}} - Nara Prefecture, Sakurai City. * {{ill|Hiro Hachiman Shrine|ja|広八幡神社}} subsidiary shrine - Wakayama Prefecture, Hirogawa Town; shrine building designated as an Important Cultural Property. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Gosen)|ja|若宮社（五泉市)}} - Niigata Prefecture, Gosen City. * {{ill|Suzumemori Wakamiya-sha|ja|雀森若宮社}} - Niigata Prefecture, Tsubame City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Okazaki)|ja|若宮社 (岡崎市)}} - Aichi Prefecture, Okazaki City. * {{ill|Hakusan Shrine (Heguri)|ja|白山神社 (平群町)}} subsidiary shrine - Nara Prefecture, Heguri Town. * {{ill|Chinjyu Wakamiya-sha|ja|鎮守若宮社}} - Ehime Prefecture, Matsuyama City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Saga)|ja|若宮社 (佐賀市)}} - Saga Prefecture, Saga City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Usa)|ja|若宮社 (宇佐市)}} - Ōita Prefecture, Usa City.

revision.comment: 見出しの追加。表記の統一。住所の重複の削除とリンク設定。
revision.text:
'''若宮社'''（わかみやしゃ）は、日本各地にある[[神社]]。字名付きで呼ばれるものもある。
== 主な若宮社 == * [[若宮社（五泉市)|若宮社]] – [[新潟県]][[五泉市]]能代 * [[若宮社 (燕市)|若宮社]] – 新潟県[[燕市]]雀森 ： 雀森若宮社 * [[若宮社 (上越市)|若宮社]] – 新潟県[[上越市]]三和区野 * [[若宮社 (岡崎市渡町)|若宮社]] – [[愛知県]][[岡崎市]]渡町 * [[若宮社 (京都市左京区)|若宮社]] – [[京都府]][[京都市]][[左京区]][[吉田 (京都市)|吉田]] ： [[吉田神社]]摂社 * [[若宮社 (八幡市)|若宮社]] – 京都府[[八幡市]]八幡高坊 ： [[石清水八幡宮]]摂社、重要文化財 * [[水若宮社 (八幡市)|水若宮社]] – 京都府八幡市八幡高坊 ： 石清水八幡宮摂社、重要文化財 * 若宮社 – [[奈良県]][[桜井市]]三輪 ： [[大直禰子神社]]、[[大神神社]]摂社、重要文化財 * [[若宮社 (有田郡広川町)|若宮社]] – [[和歌山県]][[有田郡]][[広川町 (和歌山県)|広川町]]上中野 ： [[広八幡神社]]摂社、重要文化財 * [[若宮社 (平群町)|若宮社]] – 奈良県[[生駒郡]][[平群町]] ： [[白山神社 (平群町)|白山神社]]摂社 * [[鎮守若宮社]] – [[愛媛県]][[松山市]]持田町 * [[若宮社 (佐賀市西与賀町厘外)|若宮社]] – [[佐賀県]][[佐賀市]]西与賀町厘外 * [[若宮社 (佐賀市久保田町久保田)|若宮社]] – 佐賀県佐賀市久保田町久保田 * [[若宮社 (小城市)|若宮社]] – 佐賀県[[小城市]]三日月町 * [[若宮社 (宇佐市)|若宮社]] – [[大分県]][[宇佐市]]安心院町
== 関連項目 == * [[若宮神社]] * [[若宮八幡宮]]、[[若宮八幡神社]] * [[若宮]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:わかみやしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]] {{aimai}}

'''Wakamiya-sha''' (若宮社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. Some are distinguished by additional place names.
* {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachiman Shrine|ja|石清水八幡宮}} subsidiary shrine - Kyoto Prefecture, Yawata City; shrine building designated as an Important Cultural Property. * {{ill|Yoshida Shrine|ja|吉田神社}} subsidiary shrine - Kyoto Prefecture, Kyoto City, Sakyo Ward. * {{ill|Ōmiwa Shrine|ja|大神神社}} subsidiary shrine; another name for {{ill|Ōtataneko Shrine|ja|大直禰子神社}} - Nara Prefecture, Sakurai City. * {{ill|Hiro Hachiman Shrine|ja|広八幡神社}} subsidiary shrine - Wakayama Prefecture, Hirogawa Town; shrine building designated as an Important Cultural Property. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Gosen)|ja|若宮社（五泉市)}} - Niigata Prefecture, Gosen City. * {{ill|Suzumemori Wakamiya-sha|ja|雀森若宮社}} - Niigata Prefecture, Tsubame City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Okazaki)|ja|若宮社 (岡崎市)}} - Aichi Prefecture, Okazaki City. * {{ill|Hakusan Shrine (Heguri)|ja|白山神社 (平群町)}} subsidiary shrine - Nara Prefecture, Heguri Town. * {{ill|Chinjyu Wakamiya-sha|ja|鎮守若宮社}} - Ehime Prefecture, Matsuyama City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Saga)|ja|若宮社 (佐賀市)}} - Saga Prefecture, Saga City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Usa)|ja|若宮社 (宇佐市)}} - Ōita Prefecture, Usa City.

'''Wakamiya-sha''' (若宮社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. Some are distinguished by additional place names.

'''Wakamiya-sha''' (若宮社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. Some are distinguished by additional place names.
* {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachiman Shrine|ja|石清水八幡宮}} subsidiary shrine - Kyoto Prefecture, Yawata City; shrine building designated as an Important Cultural Property. * {{ill|Yoshida Shrine|ja|吉田神社}} subsidiary shrine - Kyoto Prefecture, Kyoto City, Sakyo Ward. * {{ill|Ōmiwa Shrine|ja|大神神社}} subsidiary shrine; another name for {{ill|Ōtataneko Shrine|ja|大直禰子神社}} - Nara Prefecture, Sakurai City. * {{ill|Hiro Hachiman Shrine|ja|広八幡神社}} subsidiary shrine - Wakayama Prefecture, Hirogawa Town; shrine building designated as an Important Cultural Property. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Gosen)|ja|若宮社（五泉市)}} - Niigata Prefecture, Gosen City. * {{ill|Suzumemori Wakamiya-sha|ja|雀森若宮社}} - Niigata Prefecture, Tsubame City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Okazaki)|ja|若宮社 (岡崎市)}} - Aichi Prefecture, Okazaki City. * (Saga)|ja|若宮社 (佐賀市)}} - Saga Prefecture, Saga City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Usa)|ja|若宮社 (宇佐市)}} - Ōita Prefecture, Usa City. == See Also == * [[若宮|Wakamiya (disambiguation)]] * [[若宮神社|Wakamiya Shrine revision.text:
'''若宮社'''（わかみやしゃ）は、日本各地にある[[神社]]。字名付きで呼ばれるものもある。
== 主な若宮社 == * [[若宮社（五泉市)|若宮社]] – [[新潟県]][[五泉市]]能代 * [[若宮社 (燕市)|若宮社]] – 新潟県[[燕市]]雀森 ： 雀森若宮社 * [[若宮社 (上越市)|若宮社]] – 新潟県[[上越市]]三和区野 * [[若宮社 (岡崎市渡町)|若宮社]] – [[愛知県]][[岡崎市]]渡町 * [[若宮社 (京都市左京区)|若宮社]] – [[京都府]][[京都市]][[左京区]][[吉田 (京都市)|吉田]] ： [[吉田神社]]摂社 * [[若宮社 (八幡市)|若宮社]] – 京都府[[八幡市]]八幡高坊 ： [[石清水八幡宮]]摂社、重要文化財 * [[水若宮社 (八幡市)|水若宮社]] – 京都府八幡市八幡高坊 ： 石清水八幡宮摂社、重要文化財 * 若宮社 – [[奈良県]][[桜井市]]三輪 ： [[大直禰子神社]]、[[大神神社]]摂社、重要文化財 * [[若宮社 (有田郡広川町)|若宮社]] – [[和歌山県]][[有田郡]][[広川町 (和歌山県)|広川町]]上中野 ： [[広八幡神社]]摂社、重要文化財 * [[若宮社 (平群町)|若宮社]] – 奈良県[[生駒郡]][[平群町]] ： [[白山神社 (平群町)|白山神社]]摂社 * [[鎮守若宮社]] – [[愛媛県]][[松山市]]持田町 * [[若宮社 (佐賀市西与賀町厘外)|若宮社]] – [[佐賀県]][[佐賀市]]西与賀町厘外 * [[若宮社 (佐賀市久保田町久保田)|若宮社]] – 佐賀県佐賀市久保田町久保田 * [[若宮社 (小城市)|若宮社]] – 佐賀県[[小城市]]三日月町 * [[若宮社 (宇佐市)|若宮社]] – [[大分県]][[宇佐市]]安心院町
== 関連項目 == * [[若宮神社]] * [[若宮八幡宮]]、[[若宮八幡神社]] * [[若宮]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:わかみやしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]] {{aimai}}

revision.text:
'''Wakamiya-sha''' (若宮社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. Some are distinguished by additional place names.
* [[:en:Iwashimizu Hachimangū|Iwashimizu Hachiman Shrine]] subsidiary shrine - Kyoto Prefecture, Yawata City; shrine building designated as an Important Cultural Property. * [[:en:Yoshida Shrine|Yoshida Shrine]] subsidiary shrine - Kyoto Prefecture, Kyoto City, Sakyo Ward. * [[:en:Ōmiwa Shrine|Ōmiwa Shrine]] subsidiary shrine; another name for {{ill|Ōtataneko Shrine|ja|大直禰子神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtataneko Shrine|qq=}} - Nara Prefecture, Sakurai City. * [[:en:Hiro Hachiman Shrine|Hiro Hachiman Shrine]] subsidiary shrine - Wakayama Prefecture, Hirogawa Town; shrine building designated as an Important Cultural Property. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Gosen)|ja|若宮社（五泉市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya-sha (Gosen)|qq=}} - Niigata Prefecture, Gosen City. * {{ill|Suzumemori Wakamiya-sha|ja|雀森若宮社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzumemori Wakamiya-sha|qq=}} - Niigata Prefecture, Tsubame City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Okazaki)|ja|若宮社 (岡崎市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya-sha (Okazaki)|qq=}} - Aichi Prefecture, Okazaki City. * {{ill|Hakusan Shrine (Heguri)|ja|白山神社 (平群町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Shrine (Heguri)|qq=}} subsidiary shrine - Nara Prefecture, Heguri Town. * {{ill|Chinjyu Wakamiya-sha|ja|鎮守若宮社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinjyu Wakamiya-sha|qq=}} - Ehime Prefecture, Matsuyama City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Saga)|ja|若宮社 (佐賀市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya-sha (Saga)|qq=}} - Saga Prefecture, Saga City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Usa)|ja|若宮社 (宇佐市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya-sha (Usa)|qq=}} - Ōita Prefecture, Usa City. == See Also == * [[若宮|Wakamiya (disambiguation)]] * [[若宮神社|Wakamiya Shrine (disambiguation)]] * [[若宮八幡宮|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū (disambiguation)]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:若宮社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:若宮社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:若宮社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11616278]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:20, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Wakamiya-sha''' (若宮社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. Some are distinguished by additional place names.
* {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|en|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|WD=Q710098|lt=Iwashimizu Hachiman Shrine}} subsidiary shrine - Kyoto Prefecture, Yawata City; shrine building designated as an Important Cultural Property. * {{ill|Yoshida Shrine|en|Yoshida Shrine|WD=Q713177|lt=Yoshida Shrine}} subsidiary shrine - Kyoto Prefecture, Kyoto City, Sakyo Ward. * {{ill|Ōmiwa Shrine|en|Ōmiwa Shrine|WD=Q705542|lt=Ōmiwa Shrine}} subsidiary shrine; another name for {{ill|Ōtataneko Shrine|ja|大直禰子神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtataneko Shrine|qq=}} - Nara Prefecture, Sakurai City. * {{ill|Hiro Hachiman Shrine|en|Hiro Hachiman Shrine|WD=Q391335|lt=Hiro Hachiman Shrine}} subsidiary shrine - Wakayama Prefecture, Hirogawa Town; shrine building designated as an Important Cultural Property. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Gosen)|ja|若宮社（五泉市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya-sha (Gosen)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Niigata Prefecture, Gosen City. * {{ill|Suzumemori Wakamiya-sha|ja|雀森若宮社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzumemori Wakamiya-sha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Niigata Prefecture, Tsubame City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Okazaki)|ja|若宮社 (岡崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya-sha (Okazaki)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 額田地区|1=Wakamiya-sha (Okazaki)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17214124}} - Aichi Prefecture, Okazaki City. * {{ill|Hakusan Shrine (Heguri)|ja|白山神社 (平群町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Shrine (Heguri)|qq=}} subsidiary shrine - Nara Prefecture, Heguri Town. * {{ill|Chinjyu Wakamiya-sha|ja|鎮守若宮社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinjyu Wakamiya-sha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Ehime Prefecture, Matsuyama City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Saga)|ja|若宮社 (佐賀市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya-sha (Saga)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Saga Prefecture, Saga City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Usa)|ja|若宮社 (宇佐市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya-sha (Usa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Ōita Prefecture, Usa City. == See Also == * [[若宮|Wakamiya (disambiguation)]] * [[若宮神社|Wakamiya Shrine (disambiguation)]] * [[若宮八幡宮|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū (disambiguation)]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:若宮社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:若宮社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:若宮社]]
'''Wakamiya-sha''' (若宮社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. Some are distinguished by additional place names.
* {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|en|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|WD=Q710098|lt=Iwashimizu Hachiman Shrine|1=Iwashimizu Hachimangū}} subsidiary shrine - Kyoto Prefecture, Yawata City; shrine building designated as an Important Cultural Property. * {{ill|Yoshida Shrine|en|Yoshida Shrine|WD=Q713177|lt=Yoshida Shrine|1=Yoshida Shrine}} subsidiary shrine - Kyoto Prefecture, Kyoto City, Sakyo Ward. * {{ill|Ōmiwa Shrine|en|Ōmiwa Shrine|WD=Q705542|lt=Ōmiwa Shrine|1=Ōmiwa Shrine}} subsidiary shrine; another name for {{ill|Ōtataneko Shrine|ja|大直禰子神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtataneko Shrine|qq=}} - Nara Prefecture, Sakurai City. * {{ill|Hiro Hachiman Shrine|en|Hiro Hachiman Shrine|WD=Q391335|lt=Hiro Hachiman Shrine|1=Hiro Hachiman Shrine}} subsidiary shrine - Wakayama Prefecture, Hirogawa Town; shrine building designated as an Important Cultural Property. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Gosen)|ja|若宮社（五泉市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya-sha (Gosen)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Niigata Prefecture, Gosen City. * {{ill|Suzumemori Wakamiya-sha|ja|雀森若宮社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzumemori Wakamiya-sha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Niigata Prefecture, Tsubame City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Okazaki)|ja|若宮社 (岡崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya-sha (Okazaki)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 額田地区|1=Q17214124|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17214124}} - Aichi Prefecture, Okazaki City. * {{ill|Hakusan Shrine (Heguri)|ja|白山神社 (平群町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Shrine (Heguri)|qq=}} subsidiary shrine - Nara Prefecture, Heguri Town. * {{ill|Chinjyu Wakamiya-sha|ja|鎮守若宮社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinjyu Wakamiya-sha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Ehime Prefecture, Matsuyama City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Saga)|ja|若宮社 (佐賀市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya-sha (Saga)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Saga Prefecture, Saga City. * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (Usa)|ja|若宮社 (宇佐市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya-sha (Usa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Ōita Prefecture, Usa City. == See Also == * [[若宮|Wakamiya (disambiguation)]] * [[若宮神社|Wakamiya Shrine (disambiguation)]] * [[若宮八幡宮|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū (disambiguation)]]
